xposts.title: Mind as generative model predicting sensory data
xposts.excerpt: When will people notice that they are basically generative AI models that are constrained by motivation and predicting sensory data? With a suitable prompt in the right buffer, your mind can generate any self and experience in its latent space

xposts.title: LLMs generating dreams vs human minds
xposts.excerpt: A langugage model can generate a dream of an awake person. How this is fundamentally different from the dreams generated by human minds seems a harder question to me than to many others who have public opinions about it
